description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build and Deploy that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow has two jobs: build and deploy. The build job runs on ubuntu-24.04, sets up Python with versions 3.9, 3.10, 3.11, and 3.12 in a matrix, checks out the code, installs dependencies with poetry, runs flake8 and pytest tests, and uploads test results. The deploy job runs on ubuntu-24.04, sets up Python 3.10, installs dependencies with poetry, and publishes to PyPI if the event is a push with a tag reference.
